body:
**Still broken in 2026.4.14** — upgraded today, exact same symptoms.

- Group session key registered in `sessions.json`
- No JSONL file is created for that session
- No log entries when natural-language messages arrive
- `lastUpdateId` advances, so the gateway consumes the update
- Slash commands still work in the same group
- DMs to the same bot still work fine

Same config as filed, no changes needed.
